name: Easy Steak Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10.5 oz) Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cut the potatoes into quarters.
2. Place the potatoes at the bottom of the pot.
3. Cut the steak into medium-sized pieces.
4. Place the steak on top of the potatoes.
5. Sprinkle the onion soup mix over the steak.
6. Pour the mushroom soup over the top.
7. Add water to the desired level, ensuring it covers most of the ingredients.
8. Cover and cook on LOW for 6 hours. The liquid will create a gravy when serving.
